nasb.text: and they cry out with a loud voice, saying, “Salvation to our God who sits on the throne, and to the Lamb.”

esv.text: and crying out with a loud voice, “Salvation belongs to our God who sits on the throne, and to the Lamb!”

cnv.text: 他們大聲呼喊，說： “願救恩歸給那坐在寶座上我們的　神，也歸給羊羔！”

ccb.text: 大声呼喊说：“救恩来自我们坐在宝座上的上帝，也来自羔羊！”

csbs.text: 大声呼喊说： “救恩属于坐在宝座上我们的神、 属于羔羊！”
